_doc: config-v4 Phase 3 readings-seam ratchet (scripts/check-readings-boundary.mjs). Files here MAY touch point_readings/_agg_5m/_agg_1d because they predate the DAO. Remove one entry per migration PR (the STALE check forces it); a NEW file is hard-failed. `app_lib` is the served-app boundary next lint + Vercel enforce; `scripts` is a slower/possibly-permanent-allow track. End state: both arrays empty => delete this file + the .eslintrc override.
